design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate side-scrolling levels using rocket-powered mobility, combining traversal with combat against varied enemies
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Balancing forward momentum with precise platforming while managing rocket fuel and enemy encounters
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Playing as an armored knight with jetpack capabilities, combining aerial mobility with melee combat
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Emphasis on momentum-based platforming where the rocket pack is both a traversal tool and combat utility, rewarding skilled flight control and aggressive positioning

difficulty.lives_system: Multiple lives with continue points; loss of lives resets current level progression
difficulty.continues_system: Continue system present; respawn at designated checkpoints within levels
difficulty.checkpointing: Mid-level checkpoints allow progression without full level restart on death
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Limited; difficulty is fixed per level with no selectable difficulty modes documented

progression.unlock_mechanism: Sequential level progression; completion of earlier stages required to access later content
replayability_hooks: Score-based ranking system encouraging skilled playthroughs
Varied enemy placement and environmental hazards reward mastery

world_building_techniques: Character-driven premise: Rocket Knight vs antagonistic forces

boss_design.philosophy: Signature encounters punctuating level progression; opponents scaled to test player mastery of rocket mechanics

faction_indicators: Implied antagonist faction through enemy encounters
danger_signals: Boss encounters signaling escalating threat level
Varied enemy types indicating organized opposition
environmental_storytelling: Level geography reflects progression from lower to higher-stakes zones
Enemy density and placement suggest territorial control

notes: Source (TCRF) contained no accessible game-specific design documentation. All design inferences derived from paradigm analysis of Genesis-era platformers and the game's documented mechanics (rocket-powered protagonist, level-based progression). Further sources required for empirical verification of difficulty curves, specific boss designs, and narrative structure.
